entities.name: RAINWATER HARVESTING
entities.description: The collection and storage of rainwater for later use to enhance farming resilience

entities.name: DRYLAND FARMING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural systems located in regions with low or irregular rainfall

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of farming systems to withstand and recover from environmental shocks

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research on rainwater harvesting was conducted

entities.name: RAINFED AGRO-ECOLOGIES
entities.description: Ecological zones where agriculture depends primarily on rainfall

entities.name: TELANGANA
entities.description: A state in India used as a case study for mapping farm pond potential

entities.name: FARM PONDS
entities.description: Small-scale rainwater harvesting structures used for water storage

entities.name: MANDAL
entities.description: A sub-district administrative unit in Telangana used for mapping potential

entities.name: SUPPLEMENTAL IRRIGATION
entities.description: The application of stored water to crops to supplement rainfall

entities.name: LIFESAVING IRRIGATION
entities.description: Irrigation provided during critical drought periods to prevent total crop failure

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A period of deficient rainfall causing water stress to crops

entities.name: EXCESS RAINFALL
entities.description: A period of rainfall exceeding normal levels

entities.name: TAMILNADU
entities.description: A state in India where farm pond impacts were assessed

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India where farm pond impacts were assessed

entities.name: KARNATAKA
entities.description: A state in India where farm pond impacts were assessed

entities.name: MAHARASHTRA
entities.description: A state in India where farm pond impacts were assessed

entities.name: RAJASTHAN
entities.description: A state in India where farm pond impacts were assessed

entities.name: CROP YIELDS
entities.description: The measure of agricultural production per unit area

entities.name: FARM INCOME
entities.description: The total financial returns generated from farming activities

entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Domesticated animals raised on farms for income and food

entities.name: CROPPING INTENSITY
entities.description: The frequency with which a given area of land is cropped in a year

entities.name: FRUITS
entities.description: Fruit-bearing plants produced through diversification

entities.name: FODDER
entities.description: Plants grown specifically for animal feed

entities.name: AQUACULTURE
entities.description: The farming of aquatic organisms

entities.name: EX-ANTE ANALYSIS
entities.description: A predictive analysis used to assess the potential for scaling up farm ponds

entities.name: EX-POST IMPACT ASSESSMENT
entities.description: An evaluation of the actual results after the implementation of farm ponds
